summary: ThreeDScene: parametric surface with ValueTracker s_tr morphing radius ρ = (1-s)R sin v + sR at each (u, v). s=0 is sphere; s=1 is cylinder of height 2R, radius R. always_redraw Surface via Archimedes' lateral-area interpretation. Ambient rotation + fixed-frame panel showing s, name, 'area = 4πR²'.
